ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the client */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the client */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, client, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the user (e.g., view_campaigns, edit_ads) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the campaign belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., search, display, social) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the campaign */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the campaign */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_groups" (
  "ad_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad group */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the ad group belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ad group */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ad group */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ad group */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the ad group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ad group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ad group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_groups_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "ad_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad group the ad belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ad */,
  "ad_copy" TEXT /* Ad copy of the ad */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the ad */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ad */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ad */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ad was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ad was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_ad_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_group_id") REFERENCES ad_groups ("ad_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the metric belongs to */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the ad */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the ad */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions for the ad */,
  "ctr" TEXT /* Click-through rate of the ad */,
  "cpm" TEXT /* Cost per mille of the ad */,
  "cpc" TEXT /* Cost per click of the ad */,
  "cpa" TEXT /* Cost per acquisition of the ad */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_versions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_group_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "ad_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad group the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the ad group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_group_versions_ad_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_group_id") REFERENCES ad_groups ("ad_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the ad */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_versions_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the category belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the campaign (e.g., search, display, social) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_categories_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the schedule belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the ad is scheduled to run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the ad schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the ad schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_schedules_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad the target belongs to */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of targeting (e.g., demographic, interest, keyword) */,
  "target_value" TEXT /* Value of the targeting option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_targets_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)
